greeting: Move along. I— look, just don't cause any trouble and we'll both be fine.
You're not from here. Good. Take my advice: don't stay long.
I serve Lord Ashwick's guard. That's... that's all I have to say.
quest: I'm not supposed to say this, but... there's a prisoner in the tower who shouldn't be there. If someone happened to leave a key near the east wall tonight, well, I wouldn't notice.
idle: I swore an oath to protect this town. Not to terrorize it.
Roderick watches my every move. I have to be careful.
